title: 'abiyb #0024
definition:
1) fresh, young barley ears, barley
 2) month of ear-forming, of greening of crop, of growing green
    Abib, month of exodus and passover (March or April)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) fresh, young barley ears, barley
 2) month of ear-forming, of greening of crop, of growing green
    Abib, month of exodus and passover (March or April)

    NASB:  fresh, young ears, also Canaanite name for the first month of the Jewish calendar
